jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - NSDC - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the NSDC family as a Senior Teacher in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NSDC:
NSDC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDC!
